entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: validation-monitor test Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="LDAPApplication"> <ObjectRequest application="LDAPApplication" nativeIdentity="cn=contractors2,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com" op="Create" type="group"> <AttributeRequest name="dn" op="Set" value="cn=contractors2,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="cn" op="Set" value="contractors2"/> <AttributeRequest name="description" op="Set" value="Hi im test22221"/> <AttributeRequest name="objectClass" op="Set" value="top"/> <AttributeRequest name="groupOfUniqueNames" op="Set"/> <AttributeRequest name="uniqueMember" op="Set" value="cn=abdul.samad,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> </ObjectRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
